sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Supplementary Short title
On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, it Suppleme-
sections.text:
ntary
is confirmed that there was expended from the general revenues
appropriation
of the Republic such monies indicated in respect of the services
of the Republic specified in the third column of the Schedule, being
expenditure in excess of the monies appropriated for the services
of the Republic by the Appropriation Act, 2012. Act No. 16
of 2012
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K 4.00 each.
